body:

I see it, and I am leading the charge to remove him from office before it is too late. **Predictably, this has made me a target of the left.** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58090233:6HmkFelNL:m:1:3103520637:A9105D12E82A2D6DA839BF4B1147AFB7:r "Tweet")They are trying to shout me down every time I try to speak out. So, I guess that means I will have to shout a little louder. **Back in 2013, Joe and Hunter Biden flew on Air Force Two to China. Ten days later, Hunter Biden, a dropout with no business experience,_landed a $1.5 billion deal with a Communist Chinese Government's Bank of China subsidiary._** Now, Biden is directing his administration to IGNORE the mounting evidence that COVID was engineered by China, who then KNOWINGLY released it on an unsuspecting world. The Biden crime family has used their political connections to strike corrupt business deals and then refusing to act to keep us safe. **[I have filed Articles of Impeachment against Joe Biden and I need your help to pressure Congress into taking the next steps for the sake of our nation.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58090233:6HmkFelNL:m:1:3103520637:A9105D12E82A2D6DA839BF4B1147AFB7:r "I have filed Articles of Impeachment against Joe Biden and I need
your help to pressure Congress into taking the next steps for the sake of our nation.")** **_I was recently on the Sebastian Gorka radio show to disclose the evidence of Joe Biden 's dereliction of duty. You can hear it all for yourself right here:_** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58090233:6HmkFelNL:m:1:3103520637:A9105D12E82A2D6DA839BF4B1147AFB7:r "Video") We now have a president in the Oval Office who is willing to cover up the documented truth about COVID if it allows his drug-addict son to make millions from his communist employers. **Biden is beholden to Beijing 's bribes, NOT the will of the American people.** **[We have the right to hold Beijing Biden accountable for his crimes against our nation and impeach him. If you support my efforts, please help me with your donation of $25, $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58090234:6HmkFelNL:m:1:3103520637:A9105D12E82A2D6DA839BF4B1147AFB7:r "We have the right to hold Beijing Biden accountable for his
crimes against our nation and impeach him. If you support my efforts, please help me with your donation of $25, $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!")** Unlike the false smears liberals used to attack President Trump, the facts about Joe Biden and his criminal family are well documented: Biden has a history of using his office to enrich his family at the expense of our nation. If we don't act now, Biden and his criminal family will continue to ENRICH themselves while America is destroyed by more Chinese bioweapons - while Joe fiddles in the Oval Office. **[Help me impeach Beijing Biden now with a donation of $45 or more today. Our country needs you.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58090235:6HmkFelNL:m:1:3103520637:A9105D12E82A2D6DA839BF4B1147AFB7:r "Help me impeach Beijing Biden now with a
donation of $45 or more today. Our country needs you.")** God Bless America, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58090233:6HmkFelNL:m:1:3103520637:A9105D12E82A2D6DA839BF4B1147AFB7:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene") Marjorie Taylor Greene

body:
You don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.
Hey Peter, it's Governor Ron DeSantis. You know me -- I'm not one to mince words.
**Neither is President Trump.**
That's why I proudly supported him when he just made this bold statement: _" The survival of America depends upon our ability to elect Republicans at every level."_
The Liberal Media, the Radical Socialists in Congress, and Joe Biden's cronies are plowing ahead to FUNDAMENTALLY change everything that makes America great.
[**I 'm asking for you to help Republicans right now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094636:J2DOeelNR:m:1:3253819041:78ECCE652D151CB1954DDB397F783B4F:r)
Our country is at a crossroad.
We either let the Democrats turn America into a Socialist country and tear President Trump's legacy apart...
**OR we come together and prove that our America first movement is worth fighting for!**
[**If every Patriot chips in a few bucks, we will have the resources to elect Republicans up and down the ballot!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094637:J2DOeelNR:m:1:3253819041:78ECCE652D151CB1954DDB397F783B4F:r)
_This won't be easy -- we need your help._
...And you don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.
**That 's why I'm coming directly to you, Peter. Are you in?**
For America,
Ron DeSantis

Hi Peter - I'm Walt Blackman, I'm a Combat Veteran, a Conservative Patriot, and I'm running for Congress in Arizona's 1st Congressional District.

I'm reaching out because I wanted to see if you happened to catch this exchange on _CBS_ with member of the socialist Squad, Cori Bush?

⬇⬇⬇
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094654:6zcdUelrN:m:1:3253819041:DD357CE982B53E161FA900793FD1FBA0:r)

It's astonishing that in the same breath, Cori Bush is defending her spending on private security while advocating to defund the police across the country.

**Even worse, she advocates for strict gun control measures that would leave law-abiding citizens in her district completely defenseless against criminals. **

That reminds me of what corrupt 3rd-world leaders do: hire their own private security to protect themselves and force the people to live in lawless anarchy.

Peter, we can't allow these radicals to force this dangerous agenda on the American people, especially since they will never suffer the consequences.

**[That 's why I'm asking you to help send me to congress to DEFEAT 'Defund the Police' radicals like Cori Bush >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094654:6zcdUelrN:m:1:3253819041:DD357CE982B53E161FA900793FD1FBA0:r)**
[**Defeat the 'Defund the Police' Movement**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094654:6zcdUelrN:m:1:3253819041:DD357CE982B53E161FA900793FD1FBA0:r)
Peter, the most disturbing thing about this entire effort is that radicals like Cori Bush and the Minneapolis City Council understand that by defunding the police, **_more people in their cities will become victims_ ,** _**they embolden the criminals**_ , and _**more people are likely to be killed****. **_

**But they don 't care. **

That's why they walk around with private security and force their constituents to suffer the consequences.

**[Peter, we must defeat this dangerous hypocrisy from the Left, and I 'm calling on your support now to do it >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094654:6zcdUelrN:m:1:3253819041:DD357CE982B53E161FA900793FD1FBA0:r)**
[**Defeat the 'Defund the Police' Movement**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094654:6zcdUelrN:m:1:3253819041:DD357CE982B53E161FA900793FD1FBA0:r)
_Want to hear the rest of my story?_

I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world's most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War.

My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was _**the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is.**_

You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets.

We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background.

_**We believe in Freedom.**_

**We don 't believe in burning down monuments...**

**We don 't believe in burning our flag... **

**We stand up for our flag! **

**And we stand up for the United States of America!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094654:6zcdUelrN:m:1:3253819041:DD357CE982B53E161FA900793FD1FBA0:r)

I'm running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it.

**I 've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! **

**If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link: [https://secure.winred.com/walt-blackman-for-congress/action-2692980](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094654:6zcdUelrN:m:1:3253819041:DD357CE982B53E161FA900793FD1FBA0:r)**

Thank you,
Walt Blackman
[**Support My Fight for Freedom**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094654:6zcdUelrN:m:1:3253819041:DD357CE982B53E161FA900793FD1FBA0:r)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: You know me, Peter. I’m not one to mince words.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
You don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.
Hey Peter, it's Governor Ron DeSantis. You know me -- I'm not one to mince words.
**Neither is President Trump.**
That's why I proudly supported him when he just made this bold statement: _" The survival of America depends upon our ability to elect Republicans at every level."_
The Liberal Media, the Radical Socialists in Congress, and Joe Biden's cronies are plowing ahead to FUNDAMENTALLY change everything that makes America great.
[**I 'm asking for you to help Republicans right now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094676:6m8X0el-N:m:1:3253819041:5F403917BC3263E327513DC922FE20B9:r)
Our country is at a crossroad.
We either let the Democrats turn America into a Socialist country and tear President Trump's legacy apart...
**OR we come together and prove that our America first movement is worth fighting for!**
[**If every Patriot chips in a few bucks, we will have the resources to elect Republicans up and down the ballot!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094677:6m8X0el-N:m:1:3253819041:5F403917BC3263E327513DC922FE20B9:r)
_This won't be easy -- we need your help._
...And you don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.
**That 's why I'm coming directly to you, Peter. Are you in?**
For America,
Ron DeSantis

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Essential workers are heroes.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Yet many live without basic rights and protections simply because they lack citizenship.
|
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1TnMhEDHLkG4eJ4_oneNJw==/DzEKBSSc5-zM78wc6sOGBQ==)

| | Friend,

In the early days of the COVID-19 pandemic, millions of Americans heeded the CDC's advice to stay home. But in order to make that possible, **millions of essential workers had to put their lives on the line every day** to keep our country running -- heroes who are living without basic rights and protections simply because they lack citizenship.

**[It's wrong, plain and simple. That's why I'm asking you to join me in signing a petition calling on my colleagues in Congress to provide a pathway to citizenship for essential, undocumented workers.](https://act.myngp.com/el/1TnMhEDHLkG4eJ4_oneNJw==/DzEKBSSc5-zM78wc6sOGBQ==)**

Grocery store workers who kept our shelves stocked and checked out long lines of customers every day. Sanitation workers who kept public facilities spotless to reduce the risk of infection. Delivery drivers who made it possible for millions to stay home. And countless more who did the work needed to keep our country running in a time of crisis.

**Essential workers are heroes, no doubt about it.** But right now, many are working harder and harder for lower pay than the rest of us, simply because they weren't born in the United States. That's wrong -- and I'm working to change it.

That's why, as Congress considers legislation to rebuild our nation's bridges, roads and airports, I'm calling on my colleagues to use this opportunity to provide a **path to citizenship for essential undocumented workers.** They put themselves at risk to keep our nation moving, and we all owe them a debt of gratitude.

**Together, we can finally come together and make a pathway to citizenship for essential undocumented workers a reality. If you 're with me, please add your name to the petition today.** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.myngp.com/el/1TnMhEDHLkG4eJ4_oneNJw==/DzEKBSSc5-zM78wc6sOGBQ==)
---
Thank you,
Charlie Crist

---

| Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
---

Charlie Crist for Governor
P.O. Box 1547
St. Petersburg FL 33731 United States

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Far-right Jan. 6 rioters launch Congress bid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, What happened to all of Donald Trump's loyalists who stormed the Capitol on January 6? Some were laid off from work, and many are facing serious jail time. Well, this may surprise you, Peter: **A group of those far-right insurrectionists has just launched a bid for Congress.** House GOP boss Kevin McCarthy is scrambling to distance his increasingly-radical party from the Capitol insurrectionists. But McCarthy can't deny that Republican candidates from Wisconsin to New York were prominent members of the mob that day. McCarthy is revving up the GOP propaganda machine to cover their tracks. **It's up to us, Peter, to stand up against violent extremism by making sure no alt-right terrorists can step foot in the Capitol ever again.** | **[BLOCK THE ALT-RIGHT BID](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33720351/299733351/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210808_GEN_FDR_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0OGYzYTIyLTU1ZjgtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BzSMW8QXQEP4WCc98GDnqlO5cRh1BdNk1Ck-UQVVeXk=)**

If you agree that violent tactics have no place in American politics, then we need your help, Peter. The House GOP is trying to save face by distancing themselves from the Jan. 6 insurrection at press conferences, but we all know that the mob was incited by Donald Trump and enabled by Trump's sycophants in Congress. The only way to root out the alt-right from our democracy is to make sure that progressive candidates who are brave enough to face these insurgents on the campaign trail have the tools they need to win. When Democrats Turn Out is leading that charge with our aggressive digital and ground campaign, but we can't do it alone. **That's where you come in, Peter.**

**[Stand with us, Peter: We have a critical $2,000 fundraising deadline that we can't afford to miss if we want to give our brave progressive leaders a fighting chance. Our deadline is tonight at midnight, and if you can chip in $5, $10, $25, or even more, you will help us hit our target. What's more, you will be taking a loud and direct stand against far-right extremism. Kevin McCarthy and the GOP want nothing more than for the American people to forget all about the January 6 insurrection. But progressives have a good memory, Peter. Thank you for reminding Republicans what a real democracy looks like.

\- When Democrats Turn Out

Well, this may surprise you, Peter: A group of those far-right insurrectionists has just launched a bid for Congress. House GOP boss Kevin McCarthy is scrambling to distance his increasingly-radical party from the Capitol insurrectionists. But McCarthy can't deny that Republican candidates from Wisconsin to New York were prominent members of the mob that day. McCarthy is revving up the GOP propaganda machine to cover their tracks. It's up to us, Peter, to stand up against violent extremism by making sure no alt-right terrorists can step foot in the Capitol ever again. | = If you agree that violent tactics have no place in American politics, then we need your help, Peter. The House GOP is trying to save face by distancing themselves from the Jan. 6 insurrection at press conferences, but we all know that the mob was incited by Donald Trump and enabled by Trump's sycophants in Congress. The only way to root out the alt-right from our democracy is to make sure that progressive candidates who are brave enough to face these insurgents on the campaign trail have the tools they need to win. Hi there, I'd really prefer not to send you emails asking for money. My focus continues to be fighting for families like yours in the Senate. However, I'm reaching out today because we're behind on our emergency goal of $25,000, and if we don't reach it, we'll have to lower our fundraising projections for the month. Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and far-right corporate special interests know that beating me in New Hampshire is their best chance at taking back the Senate majority, so they're watching us like a hawk for any sign of weakness. name: Cheri Beasley 2022
subject: Cheri was told a mom couldn’t win. So she knocked doors with her twin boys in a stroller and proved them wrong.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
There’s something you need to know about Cheri:
#

There’s something you need to know about Cheri: She’s a fighter.
She’s not afraid to stand up to bullies, doubters and naysayers who want us to accept outdated ideas or a broken status quo.
In Cheri’s first campaign, her opponent said she wouldn’t be able to win because she was a mom.
So Cheri proved him wrong. Her twin boys went everywhere with her. She would walk neighborhoods and knock doors with them in the stroller and a diaper bag in tow. And then she won that race! By 30 points.
This is who Cheri is, and it’s why we can count on her to fight for all of us in the Senate. She’ll go toe to toe with Mitch McConnell and do what is right for North Carolina’s families.
But first we have to win this campaign, and it will take all of us to help win this campaign.
**[If you’re ready for a new Senator who will fight for the people of North Carolina, please consider making a $3 contribution to our campaign today. This will be a difficult campaign, so your support is critical.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33721407/299737431/-1934872477?refcode2=85191753-59f8-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210808-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTE5MTc1My01OWY4LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Uy1sXpnyk6XsHFPSzTnBD8ngdU8RQ4CUUH8OzUizgI=)**

Peter, I won’t take much of your time ‐‐ but this is so important.

Yesterday, my campaign fell just short of our 150 donor goal. [**With only a few months before voting begins in Virginia, every dollar helps us keep the pace. So I’m humbly asking you to chip in $3 or whatever amount you can afford today to make up this deficit. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33723310/299745633/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode=HAFV_20210808_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDYzM2I5Yi01ZmY4LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ucTALS__pJcZAWyQ6wkQCUl7mUWBC6J5rpIpDgRyiMc=) | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33723311/299745635/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210808_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDYzM2I5Yi01ZmY4LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ucTALS__pJcZAWyQ6wkQCUl7mUWBC6J5rpIpDgRyiMc=)

Peter, I wouldn’t come to you unless it was urgent.

**But Virginia Republicans are doing all they can to turn our state ruby RED.**

We can’t afford to let this happen and turn back all the progress we’ve made with our Democratic Trifecta. Virginia deserves so much better.

That’s why I’m committed to seeing this through ‐‐ _for our democracy, for working families, for leadership that works for all Virginians, for so much more._
[**So I’m humbly asking you one more time, Peter. Can I count on your $3 donation today to support my historic campaign for Lt. Governor of Virginia? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33723312/299745636/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode=HAFV_20210808_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDYzM2I5Yi01ZmY4LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ucTALS__pJcZAWyQ6wkQCUl7mUWBC6J5rpIpDgRyiMc=)

name: Team Cranley
subject: Renewable energy is the way forward — but Republicans just made it harder to invest in wind and solar in Ohio.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
Maybe the Republicans didn't think this one through. | Team — We know that time is running out to save our planet. _If we’re going to protect Ohio for future generations, we need to act NOW._ That means finding clean energy solutions and expanding the economy through green investments. **But Republicans in Columbus just passed a law making it _harder_ for wind and solar companies to invest in Ohio.** **_[They’re plain wrong, friend. Please, sign our petition telling Republicans that you SUPPORT renewable energy as the path to a better future>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33723716/299748447/-420006301?contactdata=cRZ7JEAeG5AnZ768ckWee6yyZYZQv04C8DnvGyuWBJJIeGElktUV8sNsAXmtJx99K%2FM3ttzfV0ohDGwENFPK4Z9fuTiRagnIInjGwLWg2MwrZnSCqE%2FNbXZHLcSiI5%2BEltASIExO0A5IajFF0QCmjQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGZiYTBhZS02MWY4LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LCIGnzrPWT4lOpn18BIMjDu2CBvmAb19VtGgletFcg8=&emci=dac63882-d6f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4dfba0ae-61f8-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=22604289)_** **_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33723717/299748448/-420006301?contactdata=cRZ7JEAeG5AnZ768ckWee6yyZYZQv04C8DnvGyuWBJJIeGElktUV8sNsAXmtJx99K%2FM3ttzfV0ohDGwENFPK4Z9fuTiRagnIInjGwLWg2MwrZnSCqE%2FNbXZHLcSiI5%2BEltASIExO0A5IajFF0QCmjQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGZiYTBhZS02MWY4LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LCIGnzrPWT4lOpn18BIMjDu2CBvmAb19VtGgletFcg8=&emci=dac63882-d6f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4dfba0ae-61f8-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=22604289)_** Let’s be honest about what’s going on here: This is Republicans cracking down on environmentally friendly energy sources while boosting gas and coal power companies — _because that’s who contributes to their campaigns._ **And this isn’t just bad for our environment. This is a bad bill for Ohio’s economy, too.** By blocking wind and solar companies from coming to our state — or making them jump through unnecessary hoops if they’re able to get here at all — we’re less likely to bring their business and their jobs to Ohio. _Maybe the Republicans didn't think this one through._ **_[Will you join us and support bringing renewable energy to Ohio? Add your name to our petition right now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33723721/299748474/-420006301?contactdata=cRZ7JEAeG5AnZ768ckWee6yyZYZQv04C8DnvGyuWBJJIeGElktUV8sNsAXmtJx99K%2FM3ttzfV0ohDGwENFPK4Z9fuTiRagnIInjGwLWg2MwrZnSCqE%2FNbXZHLcSiI5%2BEltASIExO0A5IajFF0QCmjQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGZiYTBhZS02MWY4LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LCIGnzrPWT4lOpn18BIMjDu2CBvmAb19VtGgletFcg8=&emci=dac63882-d6f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4dfba0ae-61f8-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=22604289)_** Thanks, Team Cranley
**[Donate>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33723723/299748479/-248279338?refcode=em_JC_PET_WindSolarEnergy_080821_b1&amount=5&refcode2=4dfba0ae-61f8-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGZiYTBhZS02MWY4LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LCIGnzrPWT4lOpn18BIMjDu2CBvmAb19VtGgletFcg8=)**

Ohio needs a comeback. For too long, Republicans have put their extreme ideology ahead of middle-class Ohioans. It's time to clean up the corruption that bails out energy companies and lines politicians' pockets. Mayor John Cranley has led Cincinnati's revitalization, making it one of the midwest’s fastest-growing economies. Let’s be honest about what’s going on here: This is Republicans cracking down on environmentally friendly energy sources while boosting gas and coal power companies — because that’s who contributes to their campaigns. By blocking wind and solar companies from coming to our state — or making them jump through unnecessary hoops if they’re able to get here at all — we’re less likely to bring their business and their jobs to Ohio. Maybe the Republicans didn't think this one through. Thanks, Team Cranley = Ohio needs a comeback. For too long, Republicans have put their extreme ideology ahead of middle-class Ohioans. It's time to clean up the corruption that bails out energy companies and lines politicians' pockets. Mayor John Cranley has led Cincinnati's revitalization, making it one of the midwest’s fastest-growing economies. = _ Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by KTBBH PAC
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/228b2bc22ee0/election-update-del-cole-needs-you?e=76fc145c69)
---
| | [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=5cc68eb0c1&e=76fc145c69)
---
| | Team-

You know it. We know it. We say it every year. But 2021 is **THE MOST** important campaign season in most of our lifetimes here in Virginia, and we have candidates who have _**razor thin**_ margins running for re-election and Republicans are pouring millions into those districts to unseat our Progressive champions. One of those Delegates is Joshua Cole from the 28th District:
[JOSH COLE'S RACE IS CURRENTLY RATED A TOSS UP ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=50f6fb17d2&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=240fc6acba&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [Check Out the Joint Fundraising Page Here](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=a9861fad43&e=76fc145c69)
Josh was one of the "majority makers" back in 2019, bringing Democrats into control of the House by just 5 seats. That is why the 28th district is crucial for us to hold onto in 2021. Since taking the House, Democrats have been able to right the ship taking Virginia from being one of the worst states to vote in to passing our own voting rights legislation. In addition, the Commonwealth has legalized marijuana, expanded protections around Reproductive rights, passed sweeping environmental legislation, and even banned the Death Penalty for the first time in the South.

Not only is he one of the youngest elected officials in the General Assembly, Josh has been a leader on everything that we have been working towards: carrying bills to ban corporations from contributing to political campaigns and to instate a moratorium on new fossil fuel projects. **We must keep him in the House so that he can continue to do the work that we need him to do. **

The 28th District is almost 50-50 when it comes to Democrats vs Republicans so every. vote. counts. [Can you help us out by contributing $25, $50, $100, or more to our tandem fundraising effort](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=30e6a021c1&e=76fc145c69)[ to make sure that Josh gets re-elected? ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=a89334f624&e=76fc145c69)
---
| In Solidarity,
Matt

---

---
| _KTBBH takes its initials from the late great Henry Howell who said he would "Keep the Big Boys Honest." That's what Progressives need to do now in the Commonwealth of Virginia. We rely solely on everyday donors like you to make sure that we support elected officials who only answer to you, the people. [Consider helping out our cause by donating anything you can afford now. ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=6501d8dac5&e=76fc145c69)_

**"Energy Industry Showers Abbott, Other Texas Politicians With Campaign Cash"**
_\- KUT 90.5_
* * *

This is infuriating, friend.

The power crisis we endured here in Texas this year killed over 200 people and caused over $130 billion in damages. More than 4.5 million families were left without power during our worst freeze in decades, and nearly 15 million residents were on a boil water notice for days.

**Responsibility for this rests squarely on Governor Greg Abbott's shoulders.** The grid is still broken, and rather than confront the industry's failure to weatherize power plants which caused Texans to die of hypothermia -- Abbott is laser-focused on denying Texans the right to vote. Frankly, it's disgusting.

What's worse is that Abbott is now being rewarded for these failures. Reports have emerged that the oil and gas industry has been "showering" him with campaign contributions to the tune of millions -- _$4.6 million to be exact._

It's never been more clear that we need to stop Abbott and his GOP allies, but he already has $55 million in the bank to pummel campaigns like ours. We may not have massive checks from the fossil fuel industry (nor do we want them), but we do have people power, and that's exactly what it's going to take to flip Texas once and for all:

**[If you're ready to lay the groundwork to get rid of Greg Abbott and turn Texas blue, chip in $3 to support our campaign today. subject: President Biden to the GOP: “Get out of the way”

| | Peter, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has turned the coronavirus pandemic into a political stunt, and President Biden has had enough. With nearly 20% of all new coronavirus cases nationwide coming out of Florida, the sunshine state is in a full-blown crisis, and Governor DeSantis couldn't care less \-- even going so far as to call the media attention “hysteria.” But President Biden is refusing to let DeSantis wreck Florida more than he already has, slamming DeSantis' tyrannical rule by demanding: **“If you aren't going to help, please get out of the way of the people who are trying to do the right thing.”** | **[DEFEAT DESANTIS](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33729623/299769635/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210808_GEN_FDR_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhY2NlOGEyLTc2ZjgtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5t58yOqaKqLdLa6YRi0X4BzXeJOBOCj1CuQV91Bb1xs=)**

name: Marisa Wood for Congress
subject: Thank you!
body:
Dear Friend,

Thank you for joining Marisa Wood's campaign for Congress!

If you're ready to take the next step, here are three things you can do to help her defeat Kevin McCarthy.

1\. Stay updated with our campaign by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/MarisaWoodforCongress/).
2\. Make a [grassroots contribution](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-web-2022?refcode=signup-email-auto) to power our movement.
3\. Forward this email to a friends and let them know why you're supporting Marisa's campaign.

We'll be in touch soon,

Team Wood

**I'm gay.**

That’s why I knew I had to act when Donald Trump and the Republican Party sought to restrict LGBTQ+ rights and promote a culture of hatred toward OUR community.

Republicans have cruelly and proudly chipped away at every protection we’ve gained in the last few decades. But, I’m committed to pulling us out of these dark times and moving us forward again.

**Every single person deserves the dignity of equal rights and legal protection from discrimination.**

[**I will never give up this fight, but I need you on my side to keep fighting on. name: Giffords.org
subject: One Question
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends — we just have one question before the weekend comes to an end.
[**Will you make a $3 donation to help us put pressure on the Senate to vote on and pass universal background checks? Your support will go a long way towards helping us put the pressure on the Senate to save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?refcode=em210808-1-15&t=1&refcode2=458_3935704_amg3qa&akid=458%2E3935704%2Eamg3qa)
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?refcode=em210808-1-15&t=2&refcode2=458_3935704_amg3qa&akid=458%2E3935704%2Eamg3qa)**
Your support couldn’t come at a more important time, friend. The NSSF, or the National Shooting Sports Foundation, has been gaining influence lately and are actually outspending the NRA right now. They’ve been running TV spots in Maine and West Virginia to a total of $1 million to try and stop us from confirming David Chipman as the next ATF Director.
So as the NRA retreats into the shadows, the NSSF, the “new NRA,” is stepping up to take their place and we have to be ready to go head-to-head with a new opponent.
We know we can fight back against them just like we did the NRA, but we can’t do it alone. So what do you say, friend?
**You can use the link below to make a donation of any amount today:**
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/Stop-The-NSSF**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?refcode=em210808-1-15&t=3&refcode2=458_3935704_amg3qa&akid=458%2E3935704%2Eamg3qa)
Thank you for all that you do,
Team Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=458%2E3935704%2Eamg3qa) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: Friends — we just have one question before the weekend comes to an end. Your support couldn’t come at a more important time, friend. The NSSF, or the National Shooting Sports Foundation, has been gaining influence lately and are actually outspending the NRA right now. They’ve been running TV spots in Maine and West Virginia to a total of $1 million to try and stop us from confirming David Chipman as the next ATF Director. So as the NRA retreats into the shadows, the NSSF, the “new NRA,” is stepping up to take their place and we have to be ready to go head-to-head with a new opponent. We know we can fight back against them just like we did the NRA, but we can’t do it alone. So what do you say, friend? You can use the link below to make a donation of any amount today: Thank you for all that you do, Team Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

subject: We Have to Continue to FIGHT
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAVERNE GORE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Our children our communities our seniors need us to be strong and committed to making a better way...

** We have to continue the fight!
------------------------------------------------------------

I spent the morning in prayer and thought for our communities.... We all know a true belief and trust in the Lord is our answer.
Our children our communities our seniors need us to be strong and committed to making a better way... we can no longer put our faith into failed leadership...
I have prayed for God’s Peace and blessings for each of you..

This past week was a very busy one. We have attended many events including a grand opening for the RNC’s Diversity Community Center in downtown Cleveland, Summit County Fair, and ‘Fades to Braids’ Back-to-School Event; to name a few.

My team and I are EXCITED... We have a HUGE campaign to run for a couple more months. But, we need your help PLEASE in order to prepare for our upcoming battle for District 11, America, and our people.

DONATE... Donate... DONATE!!! (https://LaverneGore4Congress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f67225676452c2f3d5ae1be3a&id=90c70414d6&e=9bc9f269d0)

------------------------------------------------------------

Please join us for our featured fundraiser, after our very long primary season. Food, beverages, and a great time will be provided. The only thing we are missing is YOU! :).... Please purchase your tickets (starting at $25) below.

You can purchase your tickets here by pressing the link. (https://LaverneGore4Congress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f67225676452c2f3d5ae1be3a&id=0eb5217268&e=9bc9f269d0)

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: re: urgent priorities + your monthly support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Monthly donations are the single best way for you to make an impact for John Fetterman.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210808-2234-header&t=1&akid=2234%2E434096%2Edbl4T4)
🗳 Brand new Team Fetterman field offices across the Commonwealth
📨 Campaign literature + merch + mailers to spread John's message
📈 Targeted digital and radio ads to reach even more Pennsylvanians
📋 Organizers to reach voters in all 67 PA counties
Any chance you know what all of these urgent priorities for John's campaign have in common? 👆
Well, Peter, we'll tell you: **They all _heavily depend_ on exactly how much consistent, sustained support our people-powered campaign receives in this important early stage of the race.**
The latest polls have indicated that John Fetterman is the *only* candidate on the Democratic side who can reliably + soundly defeat every Republican in the race in a general election matchup — so we have no choice but to build this campaign for the long haul and plan our budget accordingly. **Monthly donations are the single best way for you to make an impact for John, so we must respectfully ask:**
[**_Will you start a monthly contribution of any amount to John Fetterman's campaign right now? Setting up a monthly donation is easy and secure using this link:_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27135?refcode=em20210808-2234&t=2&akid=2234%2E434096%2Edbl4T4)
**[Donate Monthly »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27135?refcode=em20210808-2234&t=3&akid=2234%2E434096%2Edbl4T4)**
Look, Peter: The only way a campaign is able to plan ahead is by projecting how much money there will be the following month.
For example, you might have heard that we're finally opening our first official campaign office in Pittsburgh at the end of the summer. Well, the only reason we were able to sign that lease in July is because, back in May, we were confident we had enough monthly donations coming in to cover the deposit.
That is why every single monthly donation — even if it's just a few bucks — is an important way to show John that you're in his corner for the long haul.
[**_Please click here to set up a monthly contribution to John Fetterman's campaign to flip this open Senate seat blue. There's honestly no amount too small, because every bit will add up in our uphill fight to defeat our eventual Republican opponent in 2022._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27135?refcode=em20210808-2234&t=4&akid=2234%2E434096%2Edbl4T4)
**[Donate Monthly »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27135?refcode=em20210808-2234&t=5&akid=2234%2E434096%2Edbl4T4)**
If we want to flip this seat for Democrats in 2022, then we must start that work now + ensure our organizing work in all 67 PA counties can continue not just through the primary, but through the general election, too.
Thank you,
Team Fetterman HQ
P.S. Starting a monthly recurring donation to John Fetterman's campaign for U.S. Senate is easy, secure, and can be canceled at any time in case your budget changes — and it's the single most impactful thing you can do for the future of our campaign. [** _Would you be able to set up a monthly, small-dollar donation of $5, $10, $27, or any amount to our campaign right now? Thank you ahead of time!_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27135?refcode=em20210808-2234&t=6&akid=2234%2E434096%2Edbl4T4)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210808-2234-footer&t=7&refcode2=2234_434096_dbl4T4&akid=2234%2E434096%2Edbl4T4)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=8&akid=2234%2E434096%2Edbl4T4)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=2234%2E434096%2Edbl4T4)

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Quick
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — we’ll keep this brief.
[**Before the weekend is over, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? We’ll put your donation right to work in our efforts to hold Arizona’s seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210808-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1115_6688874_iQVlxX&akid=1115%2E6688874%2EiQVlxX)
Last month, CNN labeled us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
And to make things worse, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to attend a rally where he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
So it’s safe to say we can’t afford to get comfortable. Trump and National Republicans think they can take back this seat in 2022, and the fact that they are already this involved in defeating us means they are serious.
Mark needs our support to hold this seat and the best way we can do that is by making sure we have the resources to run another strong campaign and win a full six-year term to the Senate.
**Your support will go a long way, so please use the link below to make a donation of any amount today:**
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/August-Goal**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210808-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1115_6688874_iQVlxX&akid=1115%2E6688874%2EiQVlxX)
Thank you for all that you do,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1115%2E6688874%2EiQVlxX).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Cisneros?=
subject: No regrets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
body:
** Jessica Cisneros
------------------------------------------------------------

Close your eyes and imagine something. Ok, maybe don’t close your eyes. Keep reading. But still imagine this...

It’s March 1, 2022 — primary election day in Texas. You’re watching the results roll in on the matchup between Henry Cuellar and Jessica Cisneros. What if she loses by just 100 votes? What if the corporate PACs and Republican donors win again?

Imagine what it would feel like to come up just barely short again. Would you look back and wonder if you could have done more to flip those last few votes?

That’s one possible outcome next March. But a very different outcome is in our hands — one where we celebrate a historic victory for Jessica and send a fearless, progressive Latina to Congress to fight for ALL of us.

We are in good shape to make that happen. But win or lose, we want to walk away with no regrets, knowing we did everything we could to pull off a victory.

Now, one of the most important things you can do to elect Jessica Cisneros is make a donation in the first week of the campaign. Why? As smart political strategists often say, “Early Money Is Like Yeast.” A dollar spent early on to help us build an effective campaign could be twice as valuable as a dollar spent at the tail end of the race when most people are donating.

Peter, don’t look back with regrets wishing you had done more early on to defeat Henry Cuellar. If you want to see Jessica Cisneros win, make a donation today to become one of our earliest supporters. (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-email-20210808-mc?refcode=em20210808-mc)

Become a Founding Donor (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-email-20210808-mc?refcode=em20210808-mc)

It happens all the time. A good, progressive candidate runs for office, but the donations and volunteer hours only spike at the end of the race when it’s too late.

But, here we are at the beginning. Let’s win this race for the people. No regrets.

- Team Cisneros

Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com (#) . If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe (https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=7873097058&e=ed416558ef&c=60b4c3133a) . Mail us: PO Box 660, Laredo, TX 78042.

**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement/?source=em210808-1-15&t=1&akid=226%2E159979%2ETfJEA0)**
Friends ––
Alex knows that in order to pass a Green New Deal or Medicare for All, it’s going to take an unprecedented grassroots operation supporting us along the way.
One of the ways we plan on getting there is by hitting our monthly fundraising goals to help Alex win reelection so we can hold our Senate majority.
However, there’s another way we can achieve this: _we need more people like you to step up and personally endorse our campaign._
So far, thousands of people have signed on to say they have Alex’s back, and we’re hoping to add another 10,000 people to that number this month.
**So that’s why we’re reaching out to those of you we haven’t seen yet on our list of folks who have signed on to make their personal endorsement.**
[**Will you add your name to say you personally endorse our campaign for Senate? It’s important for Alex and our team to know that we can count on you to fight by our side to pass our bold progressive agenda and hold this seat.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement/?source=em210808-1-15&t=2&akid=226%2E159979%2ETfJEA0)
[](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement/?source=em210808-1-15&t=3&akid=226%2E159979%2ETfJEA0)
Being a part of this team means taking on special interests, fighting for people — not corporations — and defending the dream that so many of us are striving for.
And if we can bring people together and build the kind of community that can take on these special interests, we will be unstoppable.
**So please, add your name to say you stand with Alex. It would mean so much to have your support:**
[**<https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/Personal-Endorsement/>** Thank you in advance for adding your name, Team Padilla

| | [**_I know it’s a Sunday. But I promised my husband, Tony, that I’d lend him a hand today. I’m about to explain why flipping this seat is so important and why I’m confident Tony can pull this off. But if you’re short on time, will you chip in $15 now to support him? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33733758/299785066/1129282168?refcode=20210808_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjdkNTk5Ny04YmY4LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fzKEVOf-IKI6sFLA1rPW11POrN-IyD2dRY55Ris8bZc=)

— Knocking on doors to meet voters
— Connecting with local businesses and community organizations
— Raising money to keep his campaign running
— _On top of helping me raise our two young kids!_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33733759/299785071/1129282168?refcode=20210808_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjdkNTk5Ny04YmY4LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fzKEVOf-IKI6sFLA1rPW11POrN-IyD2dRY55Ris8bZc=) That's just how Tony is.

[**_When Tony believes in something, he doesn’t stop until he gets the job done. And right now, I know in my heart that our neighbors need a fighter like Tony in Congress. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33733760/299785072/1129282168?refcode=20210808_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjdkNTk5Ny04YmY4LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fzKEVOf-IKI6sFLA1rPW11POrN-IyD2dRY55Ris8bZc=)

Like Tony, I’ve dedicated my life to public service.

I started out as a Special Education teacher and decided to go to law school so I could do more to help my students and their families. Now I run a local non-profit dedicated to helping families with children with disabilities get the support they need to be successful at school.

Tony and I are both driven by a mission to help others, in whatever way we can.

That’s the kind of representation that our neighbors deserve from their Congressman. Don Bacon has acted against the best interests of our community so many times, with his votes to repeal access to affordable healthcare and cut taxes for billionaires and wealthy corporations.

After Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19 and Bacon voted against COVID relief when Nebraskans needed it most, [**_I knew that Tony was the right person to replace him._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33733761/299785073/1129282168?refcode=20210808_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjdkNTk5Ny04YmY4LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fzKEVOf-IKI6sFLA1rPW11POrN-IyD2dRY55Ris8bZc=)

[**_Tony has shown us he is the leader that our community and our families need and deserve. But Don Bacon already has over $420,000 lined up to stop Tony from winning. I know if anyone can catch up and flip this seat, it’s Tony -- but only if he can hit his $5,079 goal before his midnight deadline. I’m personally asking: will you chip in $15 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33733762/299785074/1129282168?refcode=20210808_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjdkNTk5Ny04YmY4LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fzKEVOf-IKI6sFLA1rPW11POrN-IyD2dRY55Ris8bZc=)

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

name: Jim Banks, Chairman of House Conservatives Fund
subject: The biggest humanitarian crisis in America today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HOUSE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND
body:
Fellow Conservative, Joe Biden spent his first day in office undermining President Trump’s border wall, by completely halting all construction on it! That’s why I recently went to the border with President Trump to see the situation for myself. **_I saw steel meant for the border wall is_**** _literally_**** _rusting on the ground after his executive order..._** All while over **A MILLION** illegal immigrants came into this country in 2021 alone!

Derek, I know you’ve gotten a lot of emails about our lofty $1 million online fundraising goal for August, so I thought I’d reach out and explain how we got to that number.

Simply put, we need to run the largest grassroots mobilization effort Virginia has ever seen. Here’s what that entails:
* Sending Get Out The Vote literature to every corner of the Commonwealth so each and every Virginia voter knows **how and when to cast their ballot for Terry**
* Funding our TV ads — and doing our best to keep pace with Glenn Youngkin’s MASSIVE TV spending budget
* Staffing up our field organizing team all across Virginia, so we can personally **connect with every single Virginian and share Terry’s vision of progress**

These are critical elements of our GOTV plan, Derek but they can all be pretty costly.

_Not to mention, the National Republican Committee is already planning on pouring millions in Virginia to fund their own field program for Glenn Youngkin._

There’s no way around this, Derek. Glenn Youngkin has unlimited resources to spend, so we’ve got to out-hustle him on the ground.

name: Great America Update
subject: We’d love to meet them in court
body:
The teachers’ unions finally admitted the truth [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c368%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=BvdeAcuGDqayry8eLoduYQ&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65704%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3lR87qo766GqALvOD3ZkWA&sysid=1) Fellow American, _The teachers’ unions finally admitted the truth: they want to bring Critical Race Theory to our country’s schools._ Critical Race Theory divides students by race and pits them against each other as either “oppressors” or “oppressed,” indoctrinating kids with fake anti-American history, radicalism, and even engaging in _actual discrimination_ against some students. This radically destructive agenda is derived from Marxist Critical Theory that aims to undermine western free-market democracy and push the country in an extreme direction. **Like you, I have unapologetically opposed Critical Race Theory, and I won’t stop now -- not when the future of our nation and the educational opportunities of our kids relies on us.** [**Whether you’re a parent, grandparent, or concerned community member, I need your immediate signature on the National Petition to Stop Critical Race Theory in Schools, which I’ll use to show legislators on Capitol Hill, the Department of Education, the media, radical teachers’ associations, and “woke” school districts what Americans _really_ think.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65715%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5S08cb7R46MkkDZbXeYnmw&sysid=1) [**Sign today: I want Critical Race Theory out of schools**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65716%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2by%2fFHrmAaREW93zXgChpmw&sysid=1) While Parents Defending Education and concerned parents, grandparents, and community members like you want to keep this toxic ideology out of our classrooms, the largest teacher unions in the country are promoting this political indoctrination! The American Federation of Teachers (AFT) has vowed to defend members who are punished for teaching Critical Race Theory in defiance of a growing number of states that have passed legislation removing it from their schools’ curriculums. AFT’s president has even stated the union is preparing litigation. **_Well, Parents Defending Education would love to meet the AFT in court._** I welcome the challenge to defend healthy, non-political education for all students. I want better for my kids and yours, and I want our students prepared to compete in the global economy. [**To stand against Critical Race Theory and the extreme agenda of teachers’ unions like AFT, please sign the national petition today.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65717%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3KBwGKNouFwTjBjF%2fgK5ZQ&sysid=1) I know that our efforts are already effective, Fellow American, because we’ve gotten the attention of the teachers’ unions. The National Education Association (NEA), the largest in the country, just passed a resolution at its annual conference to allocate more than $50,000 to “research” --_translation: investigate and smear_ -- groups like Parents Defending Education! Just like the AFT, the NEA has decided they’re “all in” for Critical Race Theory, which means they’re prepared to attack those who threaten their agenda the most. But their first line of defense is even more maddening for parents like you and me. The AFT and the NEA have _claimed_ that Critical Race Theory isn’t actually being taught in schools and that it’s a “fake crisis” invented by paranoid parents. Meanwhile, the AFT has tweeted public statements in support of Critical Race Theory and has said they’re preparing legal action ... while the NEA just passed a resolution to support the spread of Critical Race Theory to every classroom - and then removed the resolution from their website after it was exposed! **[You don’t have to be a parent to know what the AFT, NEA, and other radicals are doing to our country and our children is wrong. That’s why I need you to sign this national petition and stand up against this toxic, politicized “education”-- and restore a healthy, non-political environment for our kids.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65718%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sEv0MpYfdG3xSKlycsN0Ig&sysid=1)
** **Only together will we defeat the Goliath enemy we face. ** Thank you for your support! Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education 4532 Lee Hwy #119
Arlington VA 22207
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c368%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=BvdeAcuGDqayry8eLoduYQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c368%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=BvdeAcuGDqayry8eLoduYQ&sysid=1)

Peter,

In just a few days we celebrate a big event in our family: my daughter Sarah’s birthday!

I was hoping you would all join in celebrating and help us surprise Sarah with a card signed by all of her supporters.
[](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=fa8100f5ef7542c0bb7c9ff389447218&_e=dezphMVPVrojxJY6FaJGLZg8KJbcvfB5rkwApWPfmu_LDETYrOwNlVvzVt0eNmtqSlgwdDcNpiJzPYkONBKzEO6YavqkPqO613b7IXIncLQUlqTS9pw8DUMWnGPCgVn5s9-Dnnfyx4AS4T84fb-QfWqfWCdg2JcmW1c6_ECDtSoU_lC3HujiJhN8rjEYWR07KxOj0yBtEZl_A5x4j1ic1-VFFPOXivW0F7kChb5mrXvSLyES0Itp4LqFKnvrxs3Uoe5BeKAfZtnZJdLpSw8EWxv4DVYhH4UBXxvu7gYdg19xx4Dv3dyK_WQTrbmXI02-jGiFJCe5fLxx-jWZyhgZ7i8dr8VKl6JNi45sU8qTyUy5tDKjPJCaDrAbPynt57fvLJUSApEvs7RiepA8aC08HTGTurnmV3kHJfo46gID_Puz339BWQsVxM3UEpcvDhfM)
Sarah fights every day to ensure a better future for our great state and country. She does it for our family and for yours.

As her mom, I am so proud of the woman she has become, and as a daughter, sister, wife, and mother she is amazing - and I know she will be an incredible governor as well.

I know it would mean the world to her for you to send your best birthday wishes.

**Will you sign her card with me as soon as possible?:[https://secure.winred.com/sarah-for-governor/birthday-08082021/](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=fa8100f5ef7542c0bb7c9ff389447218&_e=dezphMVPVrojxJY6FaJGLZg8KJbcvfB5rkwApWPfmu_LDETYrOwNlVvzVt0eNmtqSlgwdDcNpiJzPYkONBKzEO6YavqkPqO613b7IXIncLQUlqTS9pw8DUMWnGPCgVn5s9-Dnnfyx4AS4T84fb-QfWqfWCdg2JcmW1c6_ECDtSoU_lC3HujiJhN8rjEYWR07KxOj0yBtEZl_A5x4j1ic1-VFFPOXivW0F7kChb5mrXtHAuGbQTnxExRkAtmOLDPj5CYr5CXbciPVLf4HAjvWldsEE4mg3nLiRw6v7bDKJBlF3zeiLmNC3vU2tlt3HCTbmjolGu2z4aK-68NFvLD_tvM-etlnGZAu_Z6ODlnQ8Qq9P_kGol4HbECa2P6sYYZR2SlL16-nLpRLXZClmHhwRvc48qp3WgWa36bD1x716Y3iX8Gp6IFXPWtE8oCKxsPJ)**

Thank you, Peter.

Janet Huckabee

name: Walt Blackman | Combat Vet
subject: they want to leave us defenseless...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walt Blackman for Congress |
body:
| |
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094836:6LZeLSlNg:m:1:3253819041:6E6E58574F9D895F2E673C01714D8F12:r)
|
---
Hi Peter - I'm Walt Blackman, I'm a Combat Veteran, a Conservative Patriot, and I'm running for Congress in Arizona's 1st Congressional District.

I'm reaching out because I wanted to see if you happened to catch this exchange on _CBS_ with member of the socialist Squad, Cori Bush?

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094836:6LZeLSlNg:m:1:3253819041:6E6E58574F9D895F2E673C01714D8F12:r)

**[Check out this INSANE VIDEO of Cori Bush NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094836:6LZeLSlNg:m:1:3253819041:6E6E58574F9D895F2E673C01714D8F12:r)**

⬇⬇⬇
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094836:6LZeLSlNg:m:1:3253819041:6E6E58574F9D895F2E673C01714D8F12:r)
[**WATCH THIS RADICAL HYPOCRISY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094836:6LZeLSlNg:m:1:3253819041:6E6E58574F9D895F2E673C01714D8F12:r)
It's astonishing that in the same breath, Cori Bush is defending her spending on private security while advocating to defund the police across the country.

**Even worse, she advocates for strict gun control measures that would leave law-abiding citizens in her district completely defenseless against criminals. **

That reminds me of what corrupt 3rd-world leaders do: hire their own private security to protect themselves and force the people to live in lawless anarchy.

Peter, we can't allow these radicals to force this dangerous agenda on the American people, especially since they will never suffer the consequences.

**[That 's why I'm asking you to help send me to congress to DEFEAT 'Defund the Police' radicals like Cori Bush >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094836:6LZeLSlNg:m:1:3253819041:6E6E58574F9D895F2E673C01714D8F12:r)**
[**Defeat the 'Defund the Police' Movement**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094836:6LZeLSlNg:m:1:3253819041:6E6E58574F9D895F2E673C01714D8F12:r)
Peter, the most disturbing thing about this entire effort is that radicals like Cori Bush and the Minneapolis City Council understand that by defunding the police, **_more people in their cities will become victims_ ,** _**they embolden the criminals**_ , and _**more people are likely to be killed****. **_

**But they don 't care. **

That's why they walk around with private security and force their constituents to suffer the consequences.

**[Peter, we must defeat this dangerous hypocrisy from the Left, and I 'm calling on your support now to do it >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094836:6LZeLSlNg:m:1:3253819041:6E6E58574F9D895F2E673C01714D8F12:r)**
[**Defeat the 'Defund the Police' Movement**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094836:6LZeLSlNg:m:1:3253819041:6E6E58574F9D895F2E673C01714D8F12:r)
_Want to hear the rest of my story?_

I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world's most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War.

My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was _**the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is.**_

You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets.

We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background.

_**We believe in Freedom.**_

**We don 't believe in burning down monuments...**

**We don 't believe in burning our flag... **

**We stand up for our flag! **

**And we stand up for the United States of America!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094836:6LZeLSlNg:m:1:3253819041:6E6E58574F9D895F2E673C01714D8F12:r)

I'm running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it.

**I 've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! **

**If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link: [https://secure.winred.com/walt-blackman-for-congress/action-2692980](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094836:6LZeLSlNg:m:1:3253819041:6E6E58574F9D895F2E673C01714D8F12:r)**

Thank you,
Walt Blackman
[**Support My Fight for Freedom**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094836:6LZeLSlNg:m:1:3253819041:6E6E58574F9D895F2E673C01714D8F12:r)

subject: Did I make a mistake?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
We’re off to a really rough start
| | |
---

| | I’m worried I made a mistake, Derek.

This morning, I committed this team to raising $1 million online during the month of August, but based on today’s response, that’s starting to look impossible...

We needed to raise $50,000 by midnight tonight to kick off this goal, and Derek, _I’m sorry to say we’re nowhere near that number._

**I’m emailing you one more time tonight to see if we can make up ground and get back on track for tonight’s goal. Will you rush a contribution right now? You can use this link to donate**

**> > [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/trm_2021_em?refcode=20210808.6_TM_8AD&refcode2=Derek](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33737086/299793782/-2023814932?refcode=20210808.6_TM_8AD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTYzZjg1ZS05Y2Y4LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LuSL3iL6ud6YMUKhIbCSmbp5qJjmB-9uvz7A4bw1mZw=)**

If we can’t pull this off, I’m going to have to set up an emergency meeting with my team tomorrow to decide what cuts we need to make to our GOTV programs — _but I really don’t want to have to do that._

I’m counting on you — let’s do this.

– Terry

name: Save Florida (via RonBeGone.com)
subject: DeSantis dropped the ball
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
1⁄5 of US COVID cases come from Florida
| Team -- Here's the tragic breakdown:

**40,000 Floridians have died of COVID-19** ... and Ron DeSantis did **NOTHING.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Ducey?=
subject: Which other states cut taxes?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ducey for Governor
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| | | Hello,
---
| The praise keeps coming in for Arizona’s historic income tax reform.

We wanted to share with you the latest from Steve Forbes this week, highlighting Gov. Ducey’s success in reducing personal income taxes to make them flatter and fairer for everyone.
---
|
---
|
**Cutting Income Tax Rates: A Happy Rx For Prosperity—Always**
_Steve Forbes_ While the White House and congressional Democrats are feverishly trying to enact massive, economy-killing tax increases, numerous states are going in the opposite direction by cutting them. These local officials recognize that reducing the tax burden on their citizens will give them more prosperity and the higher revenues that come with better times. Arizona, Ohio, Wisconsin, Oklahoma, Nebraska, Iowa, Montana, Louisiana, Idaho and New Hampshire have all passed reductions in state income taxes.

Ohio has engineered the biggest tax reduction in the Buckeye State’s history, eliminating its two tax brackets over 4%. The first $25,000 of an individual’s income is now tax-exempt. Compare that with California, where one hits the 4% bracket at that income level. Ohio’s law also ensures that people who work from home don’t have to pay taxes to cities where they no longer work.

Particularly impressive is what Arizona’s governor, Doug Ducey, managed against fierce Democratic opposition and some Republican reluctance. After much wrangling with the state legislature, the governor achieved a flat tax rate of 2.5% on incomes up to $250,000 and a rate of 4.5% on those above.
---

clean_body: | | | | And I need YOUR help! Friend, We wanted to make sure you saw this email. Last week Donald Trump Jr. officially joined our effort to take back Alaska’s US Senate seat and bring Real Conservative leadership to Washington DC! Don Jr. said it best, this race is extremely important and WE NEED YOUR HELP! Thanks, Team Kelly \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald Trump Jr. <info@kellyforak.com> Date: Fri, Aug 6, 2021 at 5:30 PM Subject: I’m on Team Kelly! To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, I’m taking over the Team Kelly email to send you all a special message! When my father endorsed Kelly earlier this year I was so excited. There’s finally a STRONG CONSERVATIVE running to take out Lisa Murkowski and her name is Kelly Tshibaka. I don’t have to tell you how important this election is. This is our opportunity to ensure Alaska has an actual Conservative representing them in the US Senate and not a swampy DC Insider like Lisa Murkowski. Kelly Tshibaka is the real deal. She’s Pro-Life, Pro-Gun, and an America First Conservative. Kelly is exactly the type of leadership that Alaska deserves and our country desperately NEEDS! Thanks, Donald Trump Jr. | | | |

Throughout the pandemic, Steve has fought for Nevadans by...
* Leading with science-based solutions and ensuring that the vaccine is widely available
* Keeping tenants in homes by paying landlords directly
* Passing a public health insurance option to ensure every person has access to health care
* Offering rental assistance to keep Nevadans in their homes throughout the pandemic
* Increasing funding for public schools so that every child receives a quality education

clean_body: | | | | | The continued support of this grassroots team has made our movement possible. Small dollar donations from folks across the state -- and the country \-- have allowed us to make critical investments in defending Battleground Nevada. And right now Steve is counting on his strongest supporters to help him over this next huge hurdle: Four radical Republicans have lined up to challenge Gov. Sisolak in 2022 -- and they’re building a huge coalition of support from National Republicans, GOP Super PACs, and right wing mega-donors. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Throughout the pandemic, Steve has fought for Nevadans by... Leading with science-based solutions and ensuring that the vaccine is widely available Keeping tenants in homes by paying landlords directly Passing a public health insurance option to ensure every person has access to health care Offering rental assistance to keep Nevadans in their homes throughout the pandemic Increasing funding for public schools so that every child receives a quality education Steve Sisolak has fought for game-changing progressive legislation during his time as governor, but all that could be erased if National Republicans succeed in flipping Nevada red. We have a strategy to organize in every corner of the state -- and we need your help to make it happen. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your support, Team Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for by Steve Sisolak for Governor Steve Sisolak for Governor** P.O. _The left thinks they can flip Texas BLUE. _

Democrats across the country are pouring MILLIONS OF DOLLARS into Texas to try and turn Texas into the next California or New York. Meanwhile, I've been fighting HARD to PROTECT our conservative agenda, but I can't continue to do it alone.

| Friends, As yet another prominent Democratic politician in Washington continues their reckless push to "defund the police," The New Hampshire Senate Republicans want to **reiterate our support for our law enforcement community and our brave officers that put their lives on the line for us every day.** ICYMI, this past week Congresswoman Cori Bush (D-MO), [declared that Americans need to "suck it up" and defund the police.](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzQ4MDYyNDQwNDEyNjgxODIzJmM9dzhiMiZlPTE5MjgmYj02ODE5OTk1MTEmZD12N2swdDNw.mS3CgTs-cYdBP0KF1r6rHIu0EVpslpVw_mLlpsI4vAg) With rising crime rates throughout the country, this is the exact opposite thing that we should be doing.

| We are proud to stand with the New Hampshire law enforcement community against these dangerous liberal proposals and will continue to defend, not defund our police.
